untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (inverted cup-with-handle) requires visual/structural identification of chart formations (rounded cup portion, handle retracement magnitude, right cup rim level). These cannot be expressed using only price and technical indicators without complex multi-bar pattern detection logic. The 'handle retraces a significant portion of the decline' and 'cup portion appears rounded' conditions require shape analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated the confirmation signal (price closes below point A/right cup rim low) as close < prev_low. Pattern structure itself cannot be mechanically detected.
